sections.heading: Problem Statement
sections.content: What is the specific pain point? (e.g., 'GitHub doesn't track logic vs doc drift').

sections.heading: V1 Requirements
sections.content: List the absolute 'must-haves' for this version to be useful.

sections.heading: Non-Goals (Scope Shield)
sections.content: Explicitly list features that are NOT being built in this version.

sections.heading: The Icebox
sections.content: Put your 'cool ideas' here so you don't lose them, but don't build them yet.
